motion_system: slow pressure from torn-paper edges, smoke-soft brush drift, and ember heat breathing through cut seams
color_drift: stone gray and smoky brown-black drift into parchment beige and muted moss, punctured by restrained red heat and a single clean blue-white highlight
glow_behavior: localized glow only at scorched notches, inventory slits, and the synthetic counter-shard; no full-screen neon wash
